channel.title: Ottava Blog
channel.description: The latest updates, tricks, and tips on data management, business intelligence, and data visualization, from Ottava.

item.title: Unlocking Data Dynamics: Understanding the Power of Pivoting and Un-pivoting
item.dc:creator: Vicky Pham
item.description: In this blog post, we explore various data analysis techniques, exploring the intricacies of pivot and unpivot methods to transform structured data efficiently.

item.title: Why Ottava?
item.dc:creator: Vicky Pham
item.description: In a world where spreadsheets and databases can be a real snooze-fest, Ottava is here to set your data dreams on fire.
